<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houthaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-iū]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[hak:Yet-yû]][[ja:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[nds:Holt-Hahn]][[vi:Ất Dậu]][[za:Ietyoux]][[zh-min-nan:It-iú]][[zh-yue:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houthaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-iū]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[hak:Yet-yû]][[ja:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[nds:Holt-Hahn]][[vi:Ất Dậu]][[za:Ietyoux]][[zh-min-nan:It-iú]][[zh-yue:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houthaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-iū]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[hak:Yet-yû]][[ja:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[nds:Holt-Hahn]][[vi:Ất Dậu]][[za:Ietyoux]][[zh-min-nan:It-iú]][[zh-yue:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rooster|kanji=乙酉|romaji=kinoto tori|onyomi=otsuyu|p=yǐyǒu|w=i-yu|mi=i²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 jau5|j=jyut6 jau5|ci=jyt̚ jɐu|mc=ʔit jɨu|oc-bs=Ɂik jɯʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 22nd combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yang Wood Monkey]] and followed by [[Yang Fire Dog]]. In the framework of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin Yang Five Elements]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Kinoto (乙)]] represents yin [[Wood (wuxing)|Wood (木)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin [[Metal (wuxing)|Metal (金)]], establishing a restraining relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)]]) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐyǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 jau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-tori
***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-tori
***Onyomi 1: ikki
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul-yu (을유)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Dậu

<!--
==
* Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐyǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 jau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: きのととり (kinoto-tori)
***Onyomi: おつかのとり (otsuka-no-tori)
***Onyomi: おつゆう (otsuyū)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulyu
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Dậu

-->
==Years of Yin Wood Rooster==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a [[Year|year]] of [[Yin Wood Rooster]].
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[25]]
* [[85]]
* [[145]]
* [[205]]
* [[265]]
* [[325]]
* [[385]]
* [[445]]
* [[505]]
* [[565]]
* [[625]]
* [[685]]
* [[745]]
* [[805]]
* [[865]]
* [[925]]
* [[985]]
|
* [[1045]]
* [[1105]]
* [[1165]]
* [[1225]]
* [[1285]]
* [[1345]]
* [[1405]]
* [[1465]]
* [[1525]]
* [[1585]]
* [[1645]]
* [[1705]]
* [[1765]]
* [[1825]]
* [[1885]]
* [[1945]]
|
* [[2005]]
* [[2065]]
* [[2125]]
* [[2185]]
* [[:en:2245|2245]]
* [[:en:2305|2305]]
* [[:en:2365|2365]]
* [[:en:2425|2425]]
* [[2485]]
* [[2545]]
* [[2605]]
* [[2665]]
* [[2725]]
* [[2785]]
* [[2845]]
* [[:en:2905|2905]]
* [[:en:2965|2965]]
|}

==Months of Yin Wood Rooster==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Kinoe (甲)]] or [[Kinoto (乙)]]), the month of [[August]] is designated as the [[Month|month (calendar)]] of [[Yin Wood Rooster]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the [[Solar term]] (from [[Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Wood Rooster==
The [[Senjitsu]] for [[Yin Wood Rooster]] is as follows.
==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}===
乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of [[Ten directions]].

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]]
[[zh-yue:乙酉]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=ja|乙酉|version=104328711|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Holt-Hahnvi]]
[[de:Yin Wood Rooster]]

[[ja:乙酉]]

[[zh:乙酉]]
[[ko:을유]]
[[fr:Coq de bois]]
[[de:Holz-Hahn]]

[[af:Houthaan (astrologie)]]
[[de:Holz-Hahneen]]
[[en:Wood Rooster]]
[[fr:Coq de boisboishak]]
[[it:Yit-chṳ́id]]

[[vi:Ất Dậu]]
[[za:Yitceij]]
[[ar:Yin Wood Rooster]]

<!--Yin Wood Rooster--><!--Yin Wood Rooster-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Ĭk-iū]]
[[hak:Yet-yû]]
[[nds:Holt-Hahn]]
[[za:Ietyoux]]
[[zh-min-nan:It-iú]]
[[zh-yue:乙酉]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Ĭk-iū]]
[[hak:Yet-yû]]
[[nds:Holt-Hahn]]
[[za:Ietyoux]]
[[zh-min-nan:It-iú]]
[[zh-yue:乙酉]]
{{wikidata link|Q185265}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
